title: BetterTP
description: A utility mod that enhances the vanilla teleport command, preventing players from getting stuck inside blocks by automatically finding the nearest safe ground.
body:
# BetterTP Mod

## Overview
This mod introduces an improved teleportation command that prevents players from getting stuck in blocks.

## Command

### `/bettertp` or `/btp`

**Syntax:** Same parameters as the vanilla `/tp` command

**Enhanced Safety Features:**
- ✅ **Anti-block trapping** - Automatically detects and avoids teleporting inside solid blocks
- ✅ **Ground finding** - Intelligently searches for the nearest safe ground position
- ✅ **Backward compatible** - Supports all original TP command parameters and functionality

## Usage Examples
/bettertp <target player> <location>
/bettertp <x> <y> <z>
/bettertp <victim> <target player>
